rulings.Case Title: GRACIELA CANIZALEZ VS. HECTOR NAVARRO et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 7, 2012, line 1. DEFENDANTs HECTOR NAVARRO, ANTHONY NAVARRO and NAVARRO FAMILY TRUST's DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT. Sustain with leave to amend as to IIED cause of action to allege new facts showing severe emotional distress; Sustain with leave to amend as to UCL cause of action to allege grounds for restitution of rent paid by third parties. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HAMBURGER PROPERTIES VS. SERGE SOROKKO (Reclassified as a Contract Action)
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff Hamburger Properties' Motion To Vacate Notice Of Conditional Settlement, Reset Case On Cmc/Trial Calendar And Reopen Discovery
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 7, 2012, line 8. Plaintiff Hamburger Properties' Motion To Vacate Notice Of Conditional Settlement, Reset Case On Cmc/Trial Calendar And Reopen Discovery. Grant setting aside conditional settlement. Deny reopening discovery. Moving party failed to comply with CCP 2024.050a and 2016.040. Deny without prejudice resetting CMC which is handled by Dept. 610. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MATTHEW IONG VS. JABRIEL GRISELL et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 7, 2012, line 2. DEFENDANTs JABRIEL GRISELL and VIVIAN WANG's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND. Grant, subject to opposition and posting $3,375.98 daily damages from date to file answer to date of order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: N.R. PATEL DBA HENRY HOTEL et al VS. CHARLES JOHNSON
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 7, 2012, line 3. DEFENDANT CHARLES JOHNSON's MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS. Off calendar, moot, second cause of action nuisance dismissed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
